title: NIELIT Course on Computer Concepts CCC Online Form 2026
short_information: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology NIELIT is a basic IT literacy program by the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (Government of India) to teach essential computer skills like document preparation, internet browsing, emailing, presentations, and digital services. Duration is 80 hours (30 theory + 60 practicals). The online exam is held every month, with registration typically starting on the 1st of the preceding month and the last date being the last day of every month. Read the notification for CCC Course eligibility, post information, selection procedure, Practice Test, pay scale and all other information. text_sections.section: How to Fill CCC Exam Online Form 2026
text_sections.content: Candidate Can Click on the Apply Online Form | Fill the All Basic Details Name, Father Name, Date of Birth and Aadhar Card, Contact Details | Upload Candidate Passport Size Photo, Signature and Thumb Impression | Pay the Examination Fee and Complete the Application Form. | Take A Print Out of Application Form | Next Month First Week You have Download Admit Card to Enter Your Application No. and DOB
